Get in Touch

Let's build something together.

I take a limited number of engagements each quarter. Tell me what you're working on and I'll get back to you within 48 hours.

Send a message

Direct contact

hello@lakecia.comLinkedIn

What happens next

1

I read every message personally. No assistants.

2

If it's a fit, we schedule a 30-minute call within a week.

3

We define scope, timeline, and outcomes before any commitment.

Typical engagements

Board advisory (quarterly)

Technology strategy sprints (2-4 weeks)

Executive coaching (6-month minimum)
